name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's evolving aesthetic. As a highlight of the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, the leather goods collection is presented in a sophisticated taupe, signaling the arrival of a new season. This GG Marmont Mini Bag is presented in a dazzling way, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Taupe V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with a burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate interior pockets, zip coin pocket, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high), snap closure.

Model: 474575.
Size: 20(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Taupe/Original leather.
Italian creation
